title: Fix checkout validation error on mobile
body:
Checkout page rejects valid payment forms on mobile browsers. Affects iOS Safari and Android Chrome. Desktop is unaffected.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Form submits successfully on iOS Safari and Android Chrome
- [ ] Validation errors render inline next to the offending field
- [ ] Regression test covers the previously failing input pattern
- [ ] No layout shift introduced on the checkout page

title: Add retry logic to entitlement webhook
body:
Entitlement webhook drops events when the downstream billing API returns 5xx. We need a bounded retry policy so paid customers do not lose access.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Exponential backoff with jitter on transient (5xx, network) errors
- [ ] Maximum five attempts then dead letter
- [ ] Idempotency key honored so retries do not double grant entitlements
- [ ] Metrics emitted for attempt count and final outcome

title: Write API documentation for /reveal endpoint
body:
The /reveal endpoint is undocumented. Partners are reverse engineering from network traces. Publish a reference page.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Request and response schema documented with examples
- [ ] All error codes listed with example payloads
- [ ] Rate limit behavior described
- [ ] Authentication requirements stated

title: Migrate user preferences to Postgres
body:
User preferences currently live in a legacy key value store that is being retired. Move the data and the read and write paths to Postgres without downtime.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Dual write window with read from old store and write to both before cutover
- [ ] Data parity check passes for one hundred percent of users
- [ ] Rollback runbook reviewed by on call
- [ ] Old store decommissioned after one full week of green metrics

title: Add rate limiting to public API endpoints
body:
Public API has no per caller rate limit. A misbehaving client took down the read path last week. Add a token bucket limiter keyed on API key.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Token bucket limiter applied per API key
- [ ] 429 response with Retry-After header on exceed
- [ ] Limits documented in the public API reference
- [ ] Internal admin keys exempted via allow list
